scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @dashboard/backend" "npm run dev -w @dashboard/frontend"
scripts.infra:up: brew services start postgresql@16 && brew services start redis
scripts.infra:down: brew services stop postgresql@16 && brew services stop redis
scripts.build: npm run build -w @dashboard/backend && npm run build -w @dashboard/frontend
